Release 1.1.1
  • macOS arm64

Mô hìnhpackages
Kiểustatic · type-first
ĐíchRust → native
Giấy phépMIT

falsum

Translation status: Tiếng Việt reader-locale proof. Code fences render through the vi pipeline; prose is canonical Latin.

Represents the false boolean value and can prefix a falsity check.

Syntax: falsum [<expression>]

Category

boolean

Related

  • verum
  • nihil

Examples

examples/corpus/falsum/falsum.fab (canonical · keyword)

Represents the false boolean value and can prefix a falsity check.

# falsum — false literal
#
# GRAMMAR:
#   literal :← 'falsum'
#
# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
#   Scalar stdout smoke (see body).
#

incipit {
    fixum _ inactive ← falsum
    nota inactive
}

Expected output:

falsum
Nguồn
  • ["examples/corpus/falsum/falsum.fab"]
